title: interview.scheduled payload (v1)
description: Emitted when an interview is booked (by the scheduling agent or a manual create). Producer: interview-service (apps/interview-service/src/lib/scheduling-tools.ts). The REAL payload is much richer than the typed InterviewScheduledPayloadSchema in packages/contracts (which lists tenantId/interviewId/candidateId/roundId/scheduledAt/panelistUserIds). The actual publish sends endAt, durationMinutes, meetingUrl, attendees, organizer, ics and externalEvent so notification-service can send a full invite with an ICS attachment. Documented from the real call site.
x-consumers: notification-service (email the candidate + panel a meeting invite with ICS; audit + webhook fan-out)

scheduledAt.description: Start time (ISO). Consumers render "soon" when null.

meetingUrl.description: Video meeting URL, when one was generated.

organizer.description: Organizer identity (email) used for the external calendar event + ICS.

ics.description: Serialized ICS body the email channel can attach.

externalEvent.description: Present when the organizer had a connected Google/Outlook calendar and the event was created there; null otherwise.

bookedByAgent.description: True when the scheduling agent booked it (vs a manual create).
